textByHash.15794d4deb21b4026c16e56121886a3342dc17be: Got any use out of that rock cake I made you ?
textByHash.1a247b3ab6d8364fa398d54fada8ae482a55b289: That's all well and good...but come back when you have all the ingredients. You're lucky Dwarves stick to their word else I might not make these cakes for you.
textByHash.1a9a375fd20368d60b469c57cf574d3aad950cc3: I would never give away me special rock cake recipe, not for all the golden nectar from the Rising Sun!
textByHash.29372a747d6ad625cc3cf14e969d1006a228473f: No! I shwears I'll never tell...
textByHash.2a35aa35366dcb9cc8ecc8ed6871a42c2e28ca08: I keep tellin you, he's fine!
textByHash.3acaf93556a1c1cf84b0d66c80233ecebac26e93: That's from the Rising Sun, the barmaid there will never tell me the recipe she uses. It's divine!
textByHash.40c22322d82bd589c8ea2e10fdef76acbd139c85: WHAT?! That wasn't a dream? Oh my aching head...
textByHash.4ed98482ff36e3b3f8771377e379d85318c780d4: You're delusional. Never would old Rohak give away his special recipe, not for all the golden nectar from the Rising Sun!
textByHash.65cead602287ce1e6b81139314be668b210bf7c7: I'm not doing it for less, even for a mate.
textByHash.668d44e075914f7785e2590395859d8dd5552c70: Oh... I suppose so. Give me the ingredients.
textByHash.6f0f8ed3c5c17c224577ccc1a3fabfcb53234f65: Also... you'll need to get the ingredients too. Milk, flour, egg and bowl of water, mind it's a bowl and not a dirty bucket.
textByHash.8bb13f84505188e362381d5d8d3067820e6a2224: There, as good as my word. Hot rock cakes to my special recipe.
textByHash.9c262551472a00ccdeb57dd31a586cf6d3b88c8c: Have you forgotten the ingredients list? I'll need an egg, a pot of flour, a bucket of milk and a bowl of water to make these cakes for you.
textByHash.9e3103bc9286cb8409fc1cebe58f0f54e151b391: My son's fine. I'm not so sure about you, though. Maybe you should lay down in a dark room until the babbling stops.
textByHash.ac1f87b31eff5b8933f40024f3ba0bab63204b20: Aye, I've still got enough ingredients from before, but I'll want 100 coins.
textByHash.b4c2e77d18ae25cba0b183743ce6f6cb4d333645: Is that what I think it is?
textByHash.ca54f9c187ddbf7751291c02a2bd050ef1f1e268: I suppose so, but you'll need all the ingredients like last time.
textByHash.d301bd568f5fad79303c5bf0173b48dc2c2c8ab1: No you couldn't, there's a special ingredient, but I'm not going to tell you what it is!
textByHash.d563558b9b8a46272fee292b2415b372716fa964: Ahhh, yer me besht mate... mate.
textByHash.e213ac4e373d5599b7b6ae8d18d293351092ef13: Fer you ? Fer you I'd... I'd... shlide down a shlope of thishtlesh wif no 'elmet on!
textByHash.f35365b416b772ebbab8e175d1b1ec6e2adb77cc: Fer you! Anyfin'! Fer a price of course!
